provenance: AfroTools reviewed exact-record registry. Records require a chain, exact EVM address, review date and credential-free HTTPS source. Unsupported legacy allegations were removed during the 2026-07-23 evidence reset.
coverage: No reviewed exact records are currently published.
limitations: Absence is not evidence of safety. This registry does not prove existence, checksum, token status, source publication, permissions, holders, liquidity, sellability, honeypot behavior or safety.
